steps.t: Mashdagâl has become increasingly agitated by the talk in Gadim-ûn.
Ulishár is at Gadim-ûn, and wishes to speak to you.
The Crypts of Khâb Daku are south-west of Gadim-ûn.
You heard the cries of hyenas and a scream to the east, near Spoiler's Crag.
The slain sorcerer at Spoiler's Crag may have something of interest on his person, as did the other you found.
Glorfindel will want to see the writings of this sorcerer of Ordâkh as well. The Elf-lord waits for you in Gadim-ûn.
